sentences.english: I always prefer texting over calling.
I can think about what I want to say before I send it.
sentences.korean: 보내기 전에 뭘 말할지 생각할 수 있거든요.

sentences.english: It takes forever to type what I could just say in ten seconds.
sentences.korean: 10초면 말할 수 있는 걸 타이핑하려면 한참 걸려요.

sentences.english: I use voice messages a lot, because it's the best of both worlds.
Quick like a call but the other person can listen whenever.
sentences.korean: 양쪽의 장점을 합친 거니까요. 전화처럼 빠르지만 상대방이 원할 때 들을 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
